resources.string: Safe Word uses accessibility to insert transcribed text directly into text fields in any app. It reads the focused text field\'s content and type to place text at the correct cursor position. No data is collected, stored, or transmitted — all processing happens on-device.
Vibrate on recording start and stop
The floating mic button is showing
The floating mic button is hidden
Your voice becomes text, right on your phone. No cloud, no accounts, no internet needed after setup.
So I can turn your voice into text
Safe Word needs your microphone to hear and transcribe your voice in real time. Your audio never leaves this device.
Everything happens on your phone — nothing is ever sent out. The mic is only on while you\'re recording.
Downloading what I need to understand you. After this, everything works offline.
This is how Safe Word understands your voice — and it runs entirely on your phone. Once downloaded, no internet connection is ever needed.
Find “Safe Word” in the list and enable the toggle. This puts a floating mic button on your screen for instant voice typing.
This puts a small mic icon on your screen so you can start voice typing from any app with one tap. You can turn it on or off anytime.
Find “Safe Word” in the list and enable the toggle. This lets Safe Word type for you in any app.
Enable the toggle for “Safe Word” to allow voice typing in any app. Without it, you’d need to paste manually.

Safe Word's accessibility service needs access to:

• The focused text field — to insert transcribed text at your cursor
• The text field type — to avoid password fields
• The app name — to detect which app you're in

All processing happens entirely on your device. No data is collected, stored, shared, or transmitted to any server.

Since Safe Word wasn't installed from the Play Store, Android needs a one-time approval:

① Tap below — Android will show a short warning
② Dismiss the warning and come back here
③ Follow the unlock steps that appear

This only happens once.
No \u22ee menu? Install Safe Word via \u201cSAI\u201d (Split APK Installer) from the Play Store, then reinstall the Safe Word APK through SAI. Android will treat it as a store app.
Switch is greyed out? Check App Info for a \u0022Restricted settings\u0022 option to approve
Can\'t find Safe Word? Scroll down — the list is in alphabetical order
Turned it on but stuck here? Tap the button below to re-check
Safe Word is ready. Open any app, tap a text field, and start talking. Everything stays on your phone — private, offline, yours.
Safe Word uses Accessibility to type text into any app on your behalf.
If the toggle is greyed out, you may need to unlock restricted settings first:
Some devices require a restart after unlocking. If it still doesn\'t work, reboot and try again.
On Samsung: Settings \u2192 Accessibility \u2192 Installed apps \u2192 Safe Word
Still stuck? Restart your phone, then try again — some devices need this after granting permissions.
Can\'t find Safe Word listed? Scroll down — services are in alphabetical order.
Download failed — check your internet connection and try again.
Download failed — not enough storage space. Free up some space and try again.
Download failed. Tap below to retry.

① Look for the floating mic button on your screen
② Open any app and tap a text field
③ Tap the mic button and start talking

Your voice becomes text — instantly, privately, offline.
Shown while the floating mic button is active
No model downloaded. Please download a model in Settings.
Device is too hot — please wait for it to cool down
No speech detected. Try speaking more clearly or closer to the microphone.
Your dictation was filtered out. Check your personal vocabulary settings.
Your dictation was filtered by post-processing. Try rephrasing.
